hero.sub: Tailored Tastes · Warm Moments · Spectacular Impressions

about.p1: JVC Catering was born from a deep passion for cooking, cultivated by our founder, Veronica Nguma. What began as a love for food evolved into a heartfelt journey connecting with people through memorable meals and meaningful celebrations.
about.p2: With over 25 years of experience, Veronica turned her dream into reality — a company rooted in authenticity, creativity, and dedication. Every dish reflects our commitment to fresh, high-quality ingredients.
about.p3: From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, JVC Catering brings warmth, flavour, and unforgettable moments to every event.
about.val1p: Fresh ingredients, love in every detail.

services.sub: From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, every event receives our full creative vision and a dedicated professional team.
services.s1p: Make your special day unforgettable with exquisite Tanzanian and international menus and seamless service.
services.s2p: Impress clients and colleagues with sophisticated catering tailored to your brand.
services.s3p: Celebrate every milestone — birthdays, anniversaries, engagements, and graduations.

menu.sub: Authentic Swahili cuisine crafted with fresh local ingredients.

sambusa.name: Sambusa
sambusa.desc: Crispy pastry parcels with spiced meat or vegetables, tamarind chutney

maandazi.name: Maandazi
maandazi.desc: Soft East African fried bread, lightly sweetened

kitumbua.name: Kitumbua
kitumbua.desc: Rice pancakes with coconut and cardamom — a Zanzibar gem

kachori.name: Kachori
kachori.desc: Golden pastry filled with spiced lentils or potatoes

mishkaki.name: Mishkaki
mishkaki.desc: Marinated beef skewers grilled over charcoal

urojo.name: Urojo Mix
urojo.desc: Zanzibari tangy soup bowl with fritters and coconut cream

pilau.name: Pilau
pilau.desc: Fragrant spiced rice with tender beef, cumin, cardamom and cinnamon

nyamachoma.name: Nyama Choma
nyamachoma.desc: Charcoal-roasted beef or goat with fresh kachumbari salad

walinazi.name: Wali wa Nazi
walinazi.desc: Coconut rice served with rich fish or chicken curry

maharage.name: Maharage ya Nazi
maharage.desc: Kidney beans in rich coconut milk with Tanzanian spices

ndizi.name: Ndizi za Kupika
ndizi.desc: Green bananas braised in coconut milk with meat and spices

biryani.name: Biryani ya Nyama
biryani.desc: Layered spiced rice with tender lamb or chicken

icecream.name: Tropical Ice Cream
icecream.desc: Mango, passion fruit, and coconut scoops made daily

cake.name: Celebration Cake
cake.desc: Custom-designed tiered cakes — chocolate, vanilla, or coconut cream

fruit.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
fruit.desc: Tanzanian watermelon, papaya, banana, pineapple and mango

halwa.name: Halwa ya Zanzibar
halwa.desc: Aromatic halwa with rosewater, cardamom and saffron

pudding.name: Coconut Pudding
pudding.desc: Silky coconut milk pudding with vanilla and caramelised banana

sweetmaan.name: Sweet Maandazi & Honey
sweetmaan.desc: Golden doughnuts with Tanzanian wildflower honey

muwa.name: Sugarcane Juice
muwa.desc: Freshly pressed Tanzanian sugarcane with lemon and ginger

juice.name: Tropical Juice
juice.desc: Cold-pressed mango, passion fruit, pineapple and guava blends

cocktail.name: Signature Cocktails
cocktail.desc: Crafted cocktails with local spirits and tropical mixers

mocktail.name: Mocktails
mocktail.desc: Hibiscus lemonade, tamarind fizz, passion fruit spritz

chai.name: Tangawizi Chai
chai.desc: Spiced tea with ginger, cardamom, cinnamon and milk

bev.name: Premium Beverages
bev.desc: Mineral water, soft drinks, Stoney Tangawizi ginger beer

testimonials.t1q: Veronica and the JVC team made our wedding an absolute dream. The Pilau was unlike anything we'd ever tasted — guests are still talking about it!
testimonials.t2q: We hired JVC for our annual conference and it was a huge success. Professional, punctual, and the food quality was outstanding.
testimonials.t3q: The birthday buffet exceeded all expectations. JVC captured exactly the theme and flavours we wanted. Mama Veronica is truly talented!

contact.sub: Fill out our 3-step form and we'll send you a personalised quote via WhatsApp.

contact.step2_sub: Tell us so we can prepare perfectly
contact.step3_sub: Review your details and add any notes

footer.desc: A Tanzanian family catering business built on authentic flavours, genuine warmth, and over 25 years of culinary excellence. Founded by Veronica Nguma.

cta.sub: Let's turn your vision into an unforgettable Tanzanian culinary experience.
